assignment: Read-only derive the final Lite execution API. Compare Scope.run, ExecutionContext.exec, RunDepsOptions, RunFnOptions, ExecFnOptions, ResourceContext, extension ExecTargetFn, docs, type tests, and prior explicit-params work. Decide the exact inferred deps-form for ctx.exec, whether name and params are required, how tags/signal behave, and which public callback forms currently pass ctx or scope. Prefer one zero-dependency form through deps: {} over a redundant callback kind. Separate public removals from core-internal context access and extension observation boundaries. Return a compatibility matrix and smallest implementation/test/doc slice. Do not edit files.

budget_and_stop_rule.stop: Stop with one source-backed API decision or a fail-closed ambiguity requiring frame authority.

hand_back_rule: Do not invent overloads, retain a context-passing callback for convenience, or edit product files.
output_schema: Executable DKR checkpoint with source refs/hashes, freshness, confidence, current API matrix, accepted target signatures, breaking impacts, required tests/docs, questions, active walls, and blocked/accepted reducing-discovery status. Worker evidence is not acceptance.
